comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration clientbound framed bytes by splitting the generated packet id/body and dispatching the body through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id, body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Configuration clientbound framed dispatch/decode; not a runtime keep-alive echo test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration clientbound framed keep-alive dispatch/decode only; it does not prove runtime keep-alive echo behavior.
